screened.title: Credit-Budgeted ICPC-Style Coding: When Agents Must Pay for Every Decision
screened.reason: 提出Agent在编码任务中需要为每个决策付出代价的约束框架，模拟资源受限下的Agent决策，对code agent的效率评测和决策策略研究有新切口。

screened.title: The Missing Knowledge Layer in Cognitive Architectures for AI Agents
screened.reason: 讨论AI Agent认知架构中缺失的知识层，属于Agent架构设计的概念性探讨，视角有启发但需看具体深度和实证支持。

screened.title: Building an Internal Coding Agent at Zup: Lessons and Open Questions
screened.reason: 企业内部coding agent的落地实践经验总结，包含实际部署中的经验教训和开放问题，对Agent系统工程化落地有直接参考价值。

screened.title: Synthius-Mem: Brain-Inspired Hallucination-Resistant Persona Memory Achieving 94.4% Memory Accuracy and 99.6% Adversarial Robustness on LoCoMo
screened.reason: 面向Agent的记忆模块设计，强调抗幻觉和对抗鲁棒性，在LoCoMo基准上取得高准确率。对Agent长期记忆和persona一致性有直接参考价值，但需看具体机制是否真有新意。

screened.title: Problem Reductions at Scale: Agentic Integration of Computationally Hard Problems
screened.reason: 将Agent与NP难问题的规约结合，视角新颖，探索LLM Agent在组合优化问题中的推理与问题转化能力，有一定开拓性。

screened.title: Heterogeneous Consensus-Progressive Reasoning for Efficient Multi-Agent Debate
screened.reason: 提出异构共识渐进推理机制来提升多Agent辩论效率，直接优化multi-agent协作中的推理效率和共识达成，对多Agent系统设计有参考意义。

screened.title: DeepReviewer 2.0: A Traceable Agentic System for Auditable Scientific Peer Review
screened.reason: 可追溯的Agentic系统用于科学同行评审，强调可审计性和溯源，对Agent系统的可信赖性和透明度设计有启发。

screened.title: Pioneer Agent: Continual Improvement of Small Language Models in Production
screened.reason: 探讨小语言模型Agent在生产环境中的持续改进，涉及Agent系统落地和持续学习，对实际部署有参考价值。

screened.title: Machine Learning-Based Detection of MCP Attacks
screened.reason: MCP（Model Context Protocol）是Agent工具调用的重要协议，针对MCP攻击的检测研究直接关联Agent安全，且切口新颖。值得关注MCP安全这一新兴方向。

screened.title: From Perception to Planning: Evolving Ego-Centric Task-Oriented Spatiotemporal Reasoning via Curriculum Learning
screened.reason: 从感知到规划的课程学习策略用于embodied agent时空推理，方向相关且有系统性贡献，但需看具体实验深度。

screened.title: RoboLab: A High-Fidelity Simulation Benchmark for Analysis of Task Generalist Policies
screened.reason: 高保真仿真环境评测任务泛化策略，直接服务于embodied agent的评测和策略分析，来自NVIDIA团队，对机器人Agent基准测试有参考价值。

screened.title: Resilient Write: A Six-Layer Durable Write Surface for LLM Coding Agents
screened.reason: 提出了LLM编码Agent的六层持久写入面架构，关注Agent在代码生成过程中的鲁棒性和可靠性问题，对code agent的系统设计有参考价值。

screened.title: ATANT v1.1: Positioning Continuity Evaluation Against Memory, Long-Context, and Agentic-Memory Benchmarks
screened.reason: 专注于Agent记忆能力的评测基准，将位置连续性与长上下文、Agent记忆benchmark进行对比定位，对理解Agent记忆机制评测有参考意义。

screened.title: ProGAL-VLA: Grounded Alignment through Prospective Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
screened.reason: VLA模型中引入前瞻推理实现grounded alignment，直接关联embodied agent的规划与决策能力，prospective reasoning机制对agent行为对齐有启发。

screened.title: Camyla: Scaling Autonomous Research in Medical Image Segmentation
screened.reason: 自主研究Agent用于医学图像分割，涉及Agent自主设计实验、写代码、迭代优化的完整工作流，是科研Agent的落地实践，对Agent系统设计有参考价值。

screened.title: A Progressive Training Strategy for Vision-Language Models to Counteract Spatio-Temporal Hallucinations in Embodied Reasoning
screened.reason: 针对embodied reasoning中VLM时空幻觉的渐进式训练策略，问题定义精准且对具身Agent可靠性有实际帮助。

screened.title: From Query to Counsel: Structured Reasoning with a Multi-Agent Framework and Dataset for Legal Consultation
screened.reason: 提出面向法律咨询的多Agent框架和数据集，涉及结构化推理和多Agent协作，对垂直领域Agent系统设计有参考价值。

screened.title: Hubble: An LLM-Driven Agentic Framework for Safe and Automated Alpha Factor Discovery
screened.reason: LLM驱动的Agent框架用于量化金融Alpha因子发现，涉及工具调用和安全约束，属于Agent在金融领域的垂直落地应用，但创新性可能有限。

screened.title: Collaborative Multi-Agent Scripts Generation for Enhancing Imperfect-Information Reasoning in Murder Mystery Games
screened.reason: 多智能体协作在不完全信息博弈场景下的推理，研究多 agent 在复杂社交推理中的协作生成，有一定新颖性。

screened.title: Ro-SLM: Onboard Small Language Models for Robot Task Planning and Operation Code Generation
screened.reason: 将小语言模型部署在机器人端进行任务规划和代码生成，涉及Agent的代码生成、任务规划和边缘部署问题，对Agent落地有实际意义。

screened.title: Time is Not a Label: Continuous Phase Rotation for Temporal Knowledge Graphs and Agentic Memory
screened.reason: 提出连续相位旋转方法处理时序知识图谱，并明确关联到Agent记忆。将时间建模融入Agent记忆机制有一定新意，但需评估实际对Agent系统的落地价值。

screened.title: BLUEmed: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Debate for Clinical Error Detection
screened.reason: 结合RAG和多Agent辩论机制进行医疗临床错误检测，涉及multi-agent协作与工具增强推理，在医疗Agent落地方向有参考价值。

screened.title: Agentic Driving Coach: Robustness and Determinism of Agentic AI-Powered Human-in-the-Loop Cyber-Physical Systems
screened.reason: 探讨 Agentic AI 在驾驶教练场景中的鲁棒性和确定性，涉及人机协作的 agent 系统设计，对 agent 在 CPS 中的可靠性问题有一定启发。

screened.title: Hardening x402: PII-Safe Agentic Payments via Pre-Execution Metadata Filtering
screened.reason: 直接涉及Agent支付场景的安全性（PII保护），属于Agent安全与系统落地的前沿切口，讨论Agent自主支付时的隐私过滤机制，方向新颖且有实际意义。

screened.reason: 直接研究对话Agent的记忆机制，提出用简单的检索+生成方式实现Agent记忆，对Agent记忆系统设计有参考价值。

screened.title: LLMs for Text-Based Exploration and Navigation Under Partial Observability
screened.reason: LLM在部分可观测文本环境中的探索与导航，直接涉及Agent规划和决策能力，对理解LLM作为agent的探索策略有参考价值。

screened.title: EvoDiagram: Agentic Editable Diagram Creation via Design Expertise Evolution

screened.title: Dialectic-Med: Mitigating Diagnostic Hallucinations via Counterfactual Adversarial Multi-Agent Debate

screened.title: Multi-ORFT: Stable Online Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Multi-Agent Diffusion Planning in Cooperative Driving

screened.title: Deep-Reporter: Deep Research for Grounded Multimodal Long-Form Generation

screened.title: Evaluating Memory Capability in Continuous Lifelog Scenario
screened.reason: 评估连续生活记录场景下的记忆能力，直接关联Agent长期记忆评测，对个人助理型Agent的记忆机制评估有启发。

screened.title: 3D-Anchored Lookahead Planning for Persistent Robotic Scene Memory via World-Model-Based MCTS
screened.reason: 与 Agent 方向有关，值得保留关注。

screened.title: When More Thinking Hurts: Overthinking in LLM Test-Time Compute Scaling

screened.title: RPA-Check: A Multi-Stage Automated Framework for Evaluating Dynamic LLM-based Role-Playing Agents
screened.reason: 针对LLM角色扮演Agent的多阶段自动评估框架，直接服务于Agent评测，但角色扮演Agent价值较窄。

screened.title: Rethinking Software Engineering for Agentic AI Systems

screened.title: Towards Autonomous Mechanistic Reasoning in Virtual Cells

screened.title: HearthNet: Edge Multi-Agent Orchestration for Smart Homes

screened.title: How Many Tries Does It Take? Iterative Self-Repair in LLM Code Generation Across Model Scales and Benchmarks
screened.reason: 研究LLM代码生成中的迭代自修复能力，直接关系到code agent的自我纠错和反思机制，对理解不同模型规模下self-repair的效果边界有价值。

screened.title: TrajOnco: a multi-agent framework for temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHR for multi-cancer early detection

screened.title: Instructing LLMs to Negotiate using Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards

screened.title: PEMANT: Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel

screened.title: Learning from Contrasts: Synthesizing Reasoning Paths from Diverse Search Trajectories
